notes: Recognizable as a squid roughly oriented like the photo, but the silhouette is distorted into a flat ray-like shape, the distinctive looping long tentacles are absent, and the interior is photo-trace noise rather than restrained FAO stipple.
specific_issues: mantle silhouette flattened/widened into stingray-like profile, not matching the photo's tubular mantle
long tentacles (the looping upper one and the lower trailing one) are missing or merged into stubby arms
arms are short, fused, and lack the splayed fan arrangement seen in the photo
no ring suckers drawn along arms
eye is barely indicated, no almond shape with filled pupil
interior covered in fragmented edge-trace squiggles rather than sparse chromatophore stipple
outline is broken into many short segments instead of a clean continuous contour
fins not clearly resolved as a distinct rhombic pair
overall reads as edge-detector output rather than an FAO scientific plate
